subject: Safari cannot open most websites
description: User reports Safari spins or shows 'cannot connect' on multiple sites; other browsers not tried.

ts_steps.title: Confirm scope
ts_steps.action: Ask if the issue affects all sites or specific URLs; try apple.com and a second known-good site.

ts_steps.title: Check date, time, and DNS
ts_steps.action: Verify System Settings → General → Date & Time (set time automatically on). Try toggling Wi-Fi off and on.

ts_steps.title: Clear Safari data for the site
ts_steps.action: Safari → Settings → Privacy → Manage Website Data — remove data for affected domain and retry.

ts_steps.title: Test without extensions
ts_steps.action: Safari → Settings → Extensions — disable all temporarily; relaunch Safari and retest.

internal_information: Common causes: incorrect system time, DNS hiccup, corrupt website data, or a misbehaving extension. Escalate if isolated to corporate proxy only after confirming other apps work.
